name: Skewered Mozzarella with Canadian Bacon
recipeIngredient: 1 package french bread, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the long and narrow French bread into 1/2 inch slices.
2. Halve each raw tomato.
3. Cut mozzarella into 1-inch squares about 1/4 inch thick.
4. Fold a slice of Canadian bacon around each piece of cheese, pressing firmly to hold in place.
5. Thread the assembled pieces onto skewers: start and end with bacon, alternating bacon, mozzarella, bread, and tomato slices.
6. Place the skewers on a baking sheet or shallow earthenware dish with the folded top of the bacon facing up.
7. Pour some tomato sauce over each skewer and sprinkle generously with parmesan cheese.
8. Drizzle lightly with paprika and additional salad oil.
9. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
10. Bake until brown on top, then serve immediately while hot.
